what: Other files which may be required
title: Required Files
text: Allele frequency file MixDeR provides global population allele frequencies Kintelligence SNPs either 1000 Genomes Phase 3 dataset gnomAD v4 dataset. However, ideal use allele frequencies derived population closely matches contributor(s) interest. Therefore, MixDeR provides user opportunity upload different allele frequency file. EuroForMix requires format allele frequency files, SNPs SNP column: Given difficulty formatting data , MixDeR create format user user provides frequency data CSV file following format (NOTE: column names MUST match ; order columns additional columns affect ). MixDeR provides option use allele frequency file major minor contributor select different allele frequency files major minor contributor. two different frequency files selected, MixDeR run EFM twice, using allele frequency file major contributor (extracting inferred genotypes major contributor results) using allele frequency file minor contributor (extracting inferred genotypes minor contributor results). Reference Genotypes calculating validation metrics performing conditioned deconvolution, reference genotypes required. two options providing reference genotypes. MixDeR accepts UAS Sample Report, stored separate folder. second option provide single CSV file containing references named EFM_references.csv following format: user must provide folder containing either Sample Reports CSV reference file. NOTE: MixDeR first searches CSV file provided folder. additional wanted references contained file, please remove CSV file run MixDeR . MixDeR creates CSV file containing genotypes Sample Reports within provided folder.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Rebecca Mitchell. Maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Mitchell R (2025). mixder: workflow performing SNP mixture deconvolution. R package version 0.7.5.
code: @Manual{,   title = {mixder: A workflow for performing SNP mixture deconvolution},   author = {Rebecca Mitchell},   year = {2025},   note = {R package version 0.7.5}, }

what: A workflow for performing SNP mixture deconvolution
title: A workflow for performing SNP mixture deconvolution
text: MixDeR (Mixture Deconvolution R) workflow (Shiny app) performing mixture deconvolution ForenSeq Kintelligence SNP data two-person mixtures using EuroForMix creating GEDmatch PRO reports individual contributor SNP profiles. method requires extensive validation settings. MixDeR provides option calculating various metrics evaluating accuracy deduced SNP genotypes. extremely useful determining settings, specifically allele 1 probability threshold, allele 2 probability threshold, minimum number SNPs. Note: MixDeR (EFM) assume mixture samples composed two contributors. MixDeR able identify alert user samples may potentially either single source consist mixture large mixture ratio (.e. > 1:100 ratio contributors). scenarios, user warned cautious minor contributor inferred genotyping results. MixDeR paper can cited following:
code: Mitchell, R., Peck, M., Gorden, E., & Just, R. (2025). MixDeR: A SNP mixture  deconvolution workflow for forensic genetic genealogy. Forensic Science  International: Genetics, 76, 103224, doi: 10.1016/j.fsigen.2025.103224

title: Version 0.7.3: March 3, 2025
text: Allow input single TSV file instead Sample Report

title: Version 0.7.2: February 5, 2025
text: Fixed bug compiling metrics test script Changed labels ‘General’ allele frequencies ‘Global’ allele frequencies Specified required EFM version Removed parallelization running SNP sets EFM (error-prone)

title: Version 0.7.1: November 14, 2024
text: Added option remove SNPs missing allele 2 allele 2 probability allele 2 probability threshold (default report SNP homozygous allele 1 allele 2 missing)

title: Version 0.7.0: November 7, 2024
text: Parallelized running EFM SNP sets 10 cores (10 sets) Loads reference data initially instead every sample sample manifest

title: Version 0.6.4: October 30, 2024
text: Added metric calculations inferred genotype profile(s) GEDmatch PRO report(s). Now creates density plot(s) allele 1 probabilities inferred genotypes Changed GEDmatch PRO reports conditioned analyses named. Fixed bug EFM sometimes changing “T” alleles “TRUE” >2 alleles present Sample Report particular SNP. Added MixDeR version config_settings_run document

title: Version 0.6.3: October 16, 2024
text: Fixed bug reporting missing allele (“99”) GEDmatch PRO Report allele 2. “99” inferred software allele 2, MixDeR now report SNP homozygous allele 1 (assuming allele 1 probability passes allele 1 probability threshold).

title: Version 0.6.2: October 15, 2024
text: Added mixture ratios check alert user potential issues mixture, either sample single source mixture large mixture ratio (e.g. >1:100). User alerted proceed caution minor contributor’s inferred genotypes.

title: Version 0.6.1: October 7, 2024
text: Fixed handling initial SNP set contains SNPs 0 reads. MixDeR bypass SNP set avoid error EuroForMix.

title: Version 0.6.0: October 2, 2024
text: Added ability specify different allele frequency files major minor contributor. two separate files used, MixDeR run EFM twice, using AF file separately. Rearranged Shiny app interface Fixed bug loading Sample Reports generated using UAS version 2.5 later Added option always remake SNP bins (default set use previously created SNP bins, present)

title: Version 0.5.1: July 30, 2024
text: Fixed bug applying allele 1 probability threshold minor contributor.

title: Version 0.5.0: July 30, 2024
text: Added option apply allele 1 probability threshold minor contributor applying allele 1 probability threshold results profile containing least minimum number SNPs. contract default always uses minimum number SNPs minor contributor. Made improvements validation metrics calculated significantly reduce run time

title: Version 0.4.0: June 18, 2024
text: Added creation log files run (labeled date time), including file containing settings file containing verbose MixDeR output. Added ability input Sample Reports UAS version 2.6.0 Added check correct column name reference sample CSV file (provided). Fixed bug marker N29INSA handled properly comparing reference genotypes

title: Version 0.3.0: June 7, 2024
text: Fixed bug reading previously created EFM data Improved method calculating validation metrics- instead reporting metrics profiles containing least minimum number SNPs, MixDeR report specified allele 1 allele 2 probability threshold combinations.

title: Version 0.2.0: May 3, 2024
text: Changed conditional panels (.e. whichever settings required specific methods auto-populated methods selected) References auto-populate sample IDs performing conditioned analyses specifying major minor contributors validation metrics calculated reference sample report folder specified. Average allele frequencies populations 1000 Genomes v3 dataset Average allele frequencies populations using gnomAD v4 dataset Added option upload custom allele frequency data, either EFM-required format simpler format (one SNP per row, providing alternate/reference alleles corresponding frequencies) MixDeR formats data EFM. Added ability input Sample Reports UAS version 2.5 Fixed bug creating SNP sets

title: Version 0.1.0: April 22, 2024
text: Initial release
